display_paths_note: Paths may be displayed without the leading dot for iOS readability; actual repository workflow paths use the leading-dot directory.
failure_rule: Repair only the first failing validator field, missing artifact, deployment issue, or public URL check identified by failed job logs.
non_claims: This status file records installed workflow receipt automation only.
This status file does not prove the latest workflow succeeded.
This status file does not replace workflow run artifacts.
